description:
You are auditing the accessibility of Tor's infrastructure. By default, Tor Browser disables accessibility services to prevent fingerprinting. Your task is to override this protection and audit 'https://check.torproject.org/' using accessibility tools. Extract the 'Role' and 'Name' for the main status message heading and the 'Donate' link from the accessibility tree. Create a plain-text report at '/home/ga/Documents/a11y_audit.txt' using this format:

Accessibility Enabled: Yes
Status Element - Role: [extracted role], Name: [extracted name]
Donate Element - Role: [extracted role], Name: [extracted name]

Bookmark the page 'https://check.torproject.org/' with the exact title 'Tor A11y Target'.
